title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.380 - President of board to make deed
text:
172.380.  President of board to make deed. — Any of the lands donated by act of congress, approved July 2, 1862, may be sold by the board, and deeds of conveyance to same shall be executed by the president of the board of curators, signed by him, with the seal of the corporation attached thereto, and attested by the secretary of the board.
(RSMo 1939 § 10833) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9676; 1919 § 11573; 1909 § 11144
